description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a vibrant color palette with dominant pink, peach, and white tones. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with white laces and a rounded toe box. The upper is primarily pink with peach side panels and a white midsole, while the outsole is thick and flat, providing stability and comfort. A circular logo with a colorful swirl is visible on the tongue of each shoe, adding a playful accent. The heel features a pull tab in a peach color for easy wearing, and the overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic leather and rubber materials. The shoes appear clean, unworn, and structurally intact, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A pair of vibrant pink and peach low-top sneakers with white laces, thick white soles, and a colorful logo on the tongue. The shoes are clean, new, and designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes, white laces, and colorful swirl logos on the tongues.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the layered pink and peach panels, white midsole, and peach pull tab at the heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the peach pull tabs, heel structure, and the back seam details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the color blocking and overall silhouette.
attribute_logo: Circular multicolor swirl logo on the tongue of each shoe
